## Validation.validateOptionsWithPreferred() function

Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in the options array.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function validateOptionsWithPreferred<TOption extends IHasId<TId>, TId extends string>(collection: IOptionsWithPreferred<TOption, TId>, context?: string): Result<IOptionsWithPreferred<TOption, TId>>;
```
